meta.role: Full-Stack Developer · IoT Engineer · Security Researcher
meta.tagline: Building the Web. Engineering the Physical. Securing the Future.

web.title: Engineering Dashboard UI
web.description: A dynamic, JSON-driven portfolio shell built entirely with vanilla JavaScript and modern CSS. Zero frameworks. Infinite scalability through a single data file.

web.title: Responsive Component Library
web.description: A handcrafted collection of accessible, zero-dependency UI components built with semantic HTML and modern CSS custom properties. Documented with live previews.

web.title: Real-time Data Visualizer
web.description: Client-side data visualization engine that consumes live sensor feeds from ESP32 nodes over WebSockets. Renders live charts using the Canvas API — no charting library required.

iot.title: Smart Home Control Node
iot.description: ESP32-based web server exposing a clean REST API for GPIO control. A single-page interface enables toggle of relays, dimmers, and IR blasters from any device on the local network.

iot.title: Environmental Monitor
iot.description: DHT22 sensor node feeding real-time temperature and humidity to a 16×2 I2C LCD display. Data is also pushed to a lightweight HTTP endpoint for web dashboard integration.

iot.title: Motion Automation System
iot.description: PIR-triggered relay automation with configurable hold-time logic baked into firmware. SPI-connected LCD shows occupancy state. Fully standalone — no internet required.

iot.title: Multi-Sensor Data Logger
iot.description: Concurrent multi-sensor aggregation node logging DHT, BMP280 (pressure/altitude), and soil moisture readings to a microSD card via SPI. Timestamped CSV output for analysis.

security.title: Broken Access Control — IDOR
security.description: Identified an Insecure Direct Object Reference allowing enumeration of private user resources by incrementing integer IDs in API responses. Verified with two distinct test accounts.

security.title: Client-Side Logic Bypass
security.description: Exploited a JavaScript-enforced feature gate that performed no server-side validation. Removing the front-end guard via DevTools console unlocked premium functionality without authorization.

security.title: Reflected XSS via Search Parameter
security.description: Unsanitized query string parameter reflected into the DOM without encoding. Crafted a payload that executes arbitrary script in victim context. Confirmed via alert() and cookie theft PoC.

security.title: Multi-Step Flow Manipulation
security.description: Discovered that a payment flow could be resumed at step 3 without completing steps 1 and 2, bypassing mandatory verification. Application accepted a forged completion token.
security.method: Flow Analysis · Token Tampering · Intercept Proxy
